mekko 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Getting started
    • Advanced features

Package index

Plot layers

Core geom and stat functions for building Marimekko plots.

StatMarimekko geom_mekko() GeomMarimekko
Create a Marimekko (mosaic) plot
geom_mekko_text()
Add text labels to a Marimekko plot
geom_mekko_label()
Add labels with background to a Marimekko plot
geom_mekko_jitter() StatMarimekkoJitter
Jitter individual observations within Marimekko tiles
geom_mekko_multi() StatMarimekkoMulti
Multi-variable Marimekko plot with nested splits

Scales

Custom scales that label axes with category names.

scale_x_mekko()
X-axis scale for Marimekko plots
scale_y_mekko()
Y-axis scale for Marimekko plots

Annotations

Annotations for statistical tests.

annotate_chisq()
Annotate a Marimekko plot with a chi-squared test

Utilities

Helper functions for data extraction and theming.

fortify_mekko()
Compute Marimekko tile rectangles as a data frame
theme_mekko()
Minimal theme for Marimekko plots

ggproto objects

Underlying ggproto classes for advanced customization.

StatMarimekko geom_mekko() GeomMarimekko
Create a Marimekko (mosaic) plot
geom_mekko_jitter() StatMarimekkoJitter
Jitter individual observations within Marimekko tiles
geom_mekko_multi() StatMarimekkoMulti
Multi-variable Marimekko plot with nested splits
